bypass_strategies.name: remove_token
bypass_strategies.description: Remove the CSRF token parameter entirely and replay the request to check if server validates token presence
bypass_strategies.method: Remove the token field from the request body or headers completely

bypass_strategies.name: empty_token
bypass_strategies.description: Send an empty string as the CSRF token value to test if the server accepts empty tokens
bypass_strategies.method: Set the token value to an empty string ''

bypass_strategies.name: short_token
bypass_strategies.description: Send a truncated version of the original CSRF token to test if partial matching is used
bypass_strategies.method: Truncate the token to the first 8 characters

bypass_strategies.name: null_byte_token
bypass_strategies.description: Inject null byte characters into the token value to test parser vulnerabilities
bypass_strategies.method: Replace portion of token with %00 or \x00

bypass_strategies.name: different_session_token
bypass_strategies.description: Use a valid CSRF token obtained from a different authenticated session to test session-token binding
bypass_strategies.method: Obtain a token from another session/user and use it in the current session's request

bypass_strategies.name: static_token_reuse
bypass_strategies.description: Replay a previously used CSRF token to test if tokens are single-use or rotated per request
bypass_strategies.method: Capture a valid token and reuse it across multiple requests

bypass_strategies.name: method_switch
bypass_strategies.description: Change the HTTP method from POST to GET (or vice versa) to bypass method-specific CSRF protections
bypass_strategies.method: Rewrite POST request as GET with parameters in URL query string

bypass_strategies.name: method_override_header
bypass_strategies.description: Use X-HTTP-Method-Override or X-Method-Override headers to simulate a different HTTP method
bypass_strategies.method: Send GET request with X-HTTP-Method-Override: POST header

bypass_strategies.name: content_type_switch_text_plain
bypass_strategies.description: Change Content-Type to text/plain to bypass CORS preflight and CSRF protections that rely on content type checks
bypass_strategies.method: Change Content-Type header to text/plain

bypass_strategies.name: content_type_switch_multipart
bypass_strategies.description: Change Content-Type to multipart/form-data to bypass content type validation checks
bypass_strategies.method: Change Content-Type header to multipart/form-data with boundary

bypass_strategies.name: content_type_switch_json
bypass_strategies.description: Change Content-Type to application/json to test JSON-based CSRF via form submission tricks
bypass_strategies.method: Change Content-Type header to application/json

bypass_strategies.name: content_type_switch_url_encoded
bypass_strategies.description: Change Content-Type to application/x-www-form-urlencoded from another content type
bypass_strategies.method: Change Content-Type header to application/x-www-form-urlencoded

bypass_strategies.name: referrer_removal
bypass_strategies.description: Remove the Referer header entirely to test if the server enforces Referer-based CSRF validation
bypass_strategies.method: Strip the Referer header from the request using <meta name='referrer' content='no-referrer'>

bypass_strategies.name: origin_removal
bypass_strategies.description: Remove the Origin header to test if the server enforces Origin-based CSRF validation
bypass_strategies.method: Strip the Origin header from the request

bypass_strategies.name: referrer_spoofing
bypass_strategies.description: Spoof the Referer header with the target domain to bypass Referer-based validation
bypass_strategies.method: Set Referer header to a URL on the target domain

bypass_strategies.name: subdomain_referrer
bypass_strategies.description: Set the Referer header to a subdomain of the target domain to test if subdomain referrers are accepted
bypass_strategies.method: Set Referer to https://attacker.target.com or https://evil.sub.target.com

bypass_strategies.name: origin_subdomain
bypass_strategies.description: Set Origin header to a subdomain of the target to test if origin validation is too permissive
bypass_strategies.method: Set Origin to https://evil.target.com

bypass_strategies.name: referrer_contains_target
bypass_strategies.description: Set Referer to an attacker URL containing the target domain as a substring to test weak string matching
bypass_strategies.method: Set Referer to https://attacker.com/target.com or https://target.com.attacker.com

bypass_strategies.name: clickjacking_combo
bypass_strategies.description: Check for absence of X-Frame-Options and CSRF protection, enabling combined clickjacking + CSRF attack
bypass_strategies.method: Verify if page can be framed (no X-Frame-Options / no CSP frame-ancestors) AND has no CSRF tokens

bypass_strategies.name: token_in_url
bypass_strategies.description: Move the CSRF token from POST body to URL query parameter to test if the server accepts it from either location
bypass_strategies.method: Move token parameter from POST body to GET query string

bypass_strategies.name: token_fixation
bypass_strategies.description: Set a known CSRF token value before authentication and check if it remains valid after login
bypass_strategies.method: Set a token cookie/value before login and verify it persists post-authentication

bypass_strategies.name: duplicate_parameter
bypass_strategies.description: Submit the same CSRF parameter multiple times with different values to test parameter pollution
bypass_strategies.method: Include csrf_token=valid&csrf_token=invalid in the request body

bypass_strategies.name: cors_misconfiguration
bypass_strategies.description: Test if CORS is misconfigured to allow cross-origin requests that bypass Same-Origin Policy protections
bypass_strategies.method: Send request with Origin: https://attacker.com and check Access-Control-Allow-Origin response

bypass_strategies.name: samesite_cookie_bypass
bypass_strategies.description: Test if SameSite cookie attribute is missing or set to None, allowing cross-site cookie submission
bypass_strategies.method: Check Set-Cookie headers for SameSite attribute; test cross-site request if SameSite=None

bypass_strategies.name: custom_header_bypass
bypass_strategies.description: Test if custom header requirement (e.g., X-Requested-With) can be bypassed via Flash or other plugins
bypass_strategies.method: Send request without X-Requested-With header to test if it is enforced server-side

test_payloads.iframe_form: <iframe style='display:none' name='csrf-frame'></iframe><form method='POST' action='{{TARGET_URL}}' target='csrf-frame' id='csrf-form'><input type='hidden' name='{{PARAM_NAME}}' value='{{PARAM_VALUE}}'></form><script>document.getElementById('csrf-form').submit();</script>

metadata.description: CSRF test tokens and bypass strategies for SMART-HUNTER CSRF Scanner
